name: Marker Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: Marker Therapeutics, Inc. (MRKR) is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing multi-antigen recognizing T cell (MAR-T) therapies, formerly known as multiTAA-specific T cells, for cancer treatment. The company leverages its MAR-T cell platform to develop product candidates targeting multiple tumor-associated antigens. Marker maintains a key collaboration with Baylor College of Medicine (BCM) to support its research and development programs.
